name: WF-INBOUND – WhatsApp Inbound + AI Closer v2

parameters.query:
SELECT EXISTS(
  SELECT 1 FROM outreach_logs
  WHERE wamid = '{{ $node["Parse WA Message"].json.wamid }}'
  LIMIT 1
) as is_duplicate

UPDATE outreach_leads
SET status = 'LOST',
    lost_at = NOW(),
    lost_reason = 'opt_out',
    bot_enabled = false,
    next_followup_at = NULL,
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE phone = '{{ $node["Check Opt-out"].json.from }}'
RETURNING id

SELECT l.id, l.name, l.email, l.phone, l.company, l.status,
       l.conversation_stage, l.attempt_count, l.ai_state,
       l.bot_enabled, l.hot_lead, l.ai_engagement_score,
       l.account_id, l.onboarding_status,
       CASE WHEN l.id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END as lead_found
FROM (SELECT 1) dummy
LEFT JOIN outreach_leads l ON l.phone = '{{ $node["Check Opt-out"].json.from }}'
LIMIT 1

UPDATE outreach_leads
SET status = 'IN_CONVERSATION',
    last_channel = 'WHATSAPP',
    last_contacted_at = NOW(),
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}'
RETURNING *

INSERT INTO outreach_leads (name, phone, status, source, conversation_stage, last_channel, last_contacted_at, attempt_count, bot_enabled)
VALUES (
  '{{ $node["Check Opt-out"].json.contact_name || "Desconocido" }}',
  '{{ $node["Check Opt-out"].json.from }}',
  'IN_CONVERSATION', 'INBOUND_WA', 'INTRO', 'WHATSAPP',
  NOW(), 0, true
)
ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET
  status = 'IN_CONVERSATION',
  last_channel = 'WHATSAPP',
  last_contacted_at = NOW(),
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING *

INSERT INTO outreach_logs (lead_id, channel, action, direction, wamid, msg_type, from_name, from_phone, message_text, processing_status)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  'WHATSAPP', 'INBOUND_MSG', 'INBOUND',
  '{{ $node["Check Opt-out"].json.wamid }}',
  '{{ $node["Check Opt-out"].json.msg_type }}',
  '{{ $node["Check Opt-out"].json.contact_name }}',
  '{{ $node["Check Opt-out"].json.from }}',
  '{{ $node["Check Opt-out"].json.text }}',
  'processed'
)
RETURNING id, lead_id

SELECT direction, message_text, created_at
FROM outreach_logs
WHERE lead_id = '{{ $json.lead_id }}'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT key, segment, stage, type, title, content, priority, topic
FROM nv_playbook
WHERE active = true
ORDER BY priority ASC

SELECT key, value
FROM outreach_config
WHERE key IN ('coupon_enabled', 'coupon_offer_stage', 'coupon_default_code', 'coupon_offer_message')

SELECT id, code, description, discount_type, discount_value, valid_until, max_uses, current_uses
FROM outreach_coupons
WHERE active = true
ORDER BY created_at ASC
LIMIT 5

INSERT INTO outreach_coupon_offers (lead_id, coupon_id)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.lead_id }}',
  '{{ $json.coupon_id }}'
)
RETURNING id

UPDATE outreach_leads
SET ai_engagement_score = {{ $json.new_score }},
    conversation_stage = '{{ $json.new_stage || $node["Prepare AI Context"].json.conversation_stage }}',
    hot_lead = {{ $json.is_hot }},
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.lead_id }}'
RETURNING id

INSERT INTO outreach_logs (lead_id, channel, action, direction, wamid, message_text, ai_state, processing_status)
VALUES (
  '{{ $node["Post-process AI"].json.lead_id }}',
  'WHATSAPP', 'BOT_REPLY', 'BOT',
  COALESCE('{{ $json.messages[0].id }}', ''),
  '{{ $node["Post-process AI"].json.reply }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ intent: $node["Post-process AI"].json.intent, score: $node["Post-process AI"].json.new_score, stage: $node["Post-process AI"].json.new_stage, reasoning: $node["Post-process AI"].json.reasoning, coupon_offered: $node["Post-process AI"].json.coupon_code_offered }) }}',
  'processed'
)
RETURNING id
